Title: Grant Status Update
Body:
Spoke with María about the CDBG grant. She's optimistic — the city council is reviewing their application next week. They've served 450 families this quarter through the food pantry.

Key contact at city: James Rodriguez, Housing Dept.

Title: Workshop Feedback
Body:
Fatima shared feedback from the winter digital literacy cohort:
- 85% completion rate
- 12 participants got library cards
- 3 seniors now use video calling with family

"Best program we've ever run" — Fatima

Title: Volunteer Numbers
Body:
Current volunteer roster: 24 active mentors.
Need 10 more for summer surge.
Keiko mentioned partnering with UT Austin's social work program.

Contact: Dr. Sarah Kim, UT Austin, skim@utexas.edu

Title: Metrics Discussion
Body:
Robert shared Q4 numbers:
- 1,200 job placements
- $15.50 avg starting wage
- 78% retention at 90 days

Funding concern: state budget may cut 15% next fiscal year.

Title: Program Expansion Ideas
Body:
Aisha proposed expanding STEM program to weekends.
Budget estimate: $12,000/quarter for materials + instructors.

Board vote scheduled for April meeting.

Title: Coding Bootcamp Results
Body:
First cohort graduated! 🎉
8 students completed, 5 already have interviews.
Carlos wants to add a web development track next quarter.

"Los estudiantes están muy orgullosos" — Carlos

Title: Broadband Update
Body:
Prairie Wind secured $50,000 in FCC funding for rural broadband pilot.
Coverage goal: 200 households by Q3.

Multi-line note test:
Line 1: Equipment ordered
Line 2: Installation crew hired
Line 3: Community meeting scheduled for April
